description_long: This filing cabinet features a modern, geometric design with two vertically offset rectangular panels rising from a deep, box-like base. The main body is a rectangular container with a clean, smooth surface, likely constructed from metal or laminated wood, and finished in a light gray color. The upper section consists of two perpendicular panels of different heights, creating a visually striking, asymmetrical silhouette. The front and back panels extend above the main box, while the lower section includes two vertical elements that mirror the upper design. There are no visible handles, label holders, or locks, suggesting a minimalist aesthetic with possible push-to-open drawers. The overall structure is robust and boxy, suitable for storing documents or office supplies in a contemporary urban environment.
description: A modern, asymmetrical filing cabinet with offset vertical panels and a deep rectangular base in light gray. The design is minimalist, with no visible handles or label holders.
description_view_0: Front view shows the offset vertical panels and the deep rectangular base, highlighting the asymmetrical design.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thinness of the vertical panels and the depth of the main box, with open space inside.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the same offset vertical panels and boxy structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again shows the thin vertical panels and the open rectangular box.
